title: oenocarpus iriartoides
intro: Oenocarpus iriartoides, also known as the mountain palm, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the family Arecaceae. The plant's seeds, bark, and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oenocarpus iriartoides include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional remedies and folk medicine.
